welcome.title: Welcome to GastroSkor!
welcome.greetingNoName: Login complete — you're ready to explore.

businessApply.trialLead: Your free trial starts when your application is approved.
businessApply.trialExit: You can leave with no commitment when the trial ends.
businessApply.trialContinue: If you want to continue after the trial, you can submit the full application form separately.
businessApply.title: Short application form
businessApply.subtitle: Takes a few minutes. Questions:
businessApply.formHint: Panel email must match the Google account you will use to sign in.
businessApply.placeRequired: Select your business from Google Maps results.
businessApply.successMessage: We will email you after review. When approved, your 3-month free trial begins.
businessApply.successTrialNote: To continue after the trial, you can submit the full form with tax document and contract.
businessApply.fullFormLater: Full documentation is for businesses continuing after the trial — or contact destek@gastroskor.com.tr.

bursa.description: Discover restaurants in Bursa with GastroSkor: see gastro scores, member reviews and Google ratings in one screen. Search venues for İskender, kebab, döner and regional flavors; leave a GS review or
bursa.registeredSubtitle: Venues in the GastroSkor database — click on the name to go to their score and review page.
bursa.noResultsWithTag: No registered restaurants found for {tag}; try the live search above to find Bursa venues.
bursa.noResultsDefault: No registered restaurants yet; use the live search above to find Bursa venues.
bursa.whatIsGastroContent: "Gastro" here is used in the sense of gastronomy and food culture. GastroSkor is an independent platform that rates restaurants across Bursa and Turkey — it has no connection to gastroenterology in the medical sense.

yoreselWeb.title: {city} regional flavors
yoreselWeb.description: Products certified by TÜRKPATENT in {city} — {count} flavors. Where to eat guide, GastroSkor-rated restaurant recommendations and FAQs for each product.

vitrinBanners.reservationSubtitle: Pick a table · double confirmation · manage in panel

liveSearch.gastroskorDesc: Default list — Google score, distance and review quality
liveSearch.socialDesc: Reddit / X / YouTube signal — different ranking, login required
liveSearch.socialFiltersNote: Distance/rating filters disabled in social proof mode — ranking is based on social signals.
liveSearch.locationLoading: Getting your location — city will be set accordingly
liveSearch.locationOff: Location off — you can pick a city from the regional section
liveSearch.modelDescGastro: Google + high score/reviews + distance + local favourites
liveSearch.modelDescSocial: Reddit, X, YouTube — Wilson score (login required)
liveSearch.loginRequired: Log in for social proof mode.
liveSearch.apiSessionError: Logged in with Google but API session failed. Sign out → sign in again (check the consent box).

socialProof.scanningNote: Reddit, X and YouTube — approx. 30–60 s · {pct}%
socialProof.sortReadyNote: Badged venues on top · Wilson score + Google review base
socialProof.noData: Not enough matches for social proof — list kept in GastroSkor order.
socialProof.noSignalLogin: No social signal for {label}. Log in for social proof mode.
socialProof.scanDescription: We scan Reddit, X and YouTube and save the result (10 scans per day).
socialProof.failed: Social scan failed. You can try again.
